_doc: UAE / GCC seed buckets — STARTER SET requiring local UAE curation. Each entry uses geography_scope='UAE' so geography overlay matching prefers them for UAE / Dubai / Abu Dhabi JDs. Buckets here cover the highest-confidence cross-sector hiring patterns visible from MBA-grade UAE/GCC postings (key account / BD, retail-banking & wealth, real estate sales, supply chain, hospitality / customer success). DO NOT treat this as a final taxonomy: salary bands, % batch, and selectivity are intentionally omitted because we lack a sourced UAE workbook equivalent to Tier-1 / Tier-2 India. Replace / extend when the curated UAE source list is provided.
source: Starter set — requires UAE curation (no sourced workbook yet)

buckets.name: UAE / GCC Key Account & Business Development
buckets.nature_of_work: Key account development across UAE and broader GCC markets; client relationship management; deal closures; cross-border account growth. Generic cross-sector pattern — sectoral specialisation typically follows Tier-2 onboarding.

buckets.name: UAE Retail Banking & Wealth Relationship Management
buckets.nature_of_work: Priority / premier banking and wealth advisory for HNI / expat clients in UAE; portfolio coverage across deposits, mortgages, insurance, and investment products. DIFC / ADGM-regulated entities are common employers. TODO: validate against actual UAE bank job descriptions before promotion.

buckets.name: UAE Real Estate Sales & Property Advisory
buckets.nature_of_work: Residential and commercial property sales in Dubai / Abu Dhabi; client acquisition; freehold and off-plan transaction support; brokerage and developer side roles. TODO: confirm RERA / DLD licensing language and split developer-direct vs brokerage roles in a follow-up curation pass.

buckets.name: UAE / GCC Operations, Supply Chain & Free-Zone Logistics
buckets.nature_of_work: Regional supply chain, procurement, warehousing, and 3PL coordination across GCC, leveraging Jebel Ali / DAFZA free-zone logistics infrastructure. Cross-sector pattern; sector-specific specialisations to be split out in a subsequent curation pass.

buckets.name: UAE Hospitality, Guest Experience & Customer Success
buckets.nature_of_work: Hotel and hospitality operations, guest experience, and customer success roles across UAE flag-carrier hotels and large F&B / retail operators; rotational management trainee paths are common. TODO: split pure-hospitality vs SaaS customer success in next curation iteration.

buckets._TODO: Curate full UAE/GCC bucket list with locally sourced data — sectors still uncovered: Oil & Gas (ADNOC / Aramco / QatarEnergy MT programs), Construction & Project Management, Free-Zone Operations (DMCC / DAFZA / DIFC), Family Office & Sovereign Wealth, Tech B2B BD (regional SaaS), Government Advisory (Tashkeel / strategic advisors), Aviation & Airline Commercial (Emirates / Etihad / Qatar Airways MT). Capture Arabic-language overlays and visa/work-authorization nuances in the overlays table separately rather than in this seed.
